246. Qubit measurement and backaction in a multimode nonreciprocal system FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: B. T. Miller, Lindsay Orr, A. Metelmann, F. Lecocq
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了集成在多模非互易系统中的量子比特测量和反作用，开发了理论工具来理解和设计此类系统，并在实验中实现了测量结果与理论预测的高度一致。
摘要翻译

高保真量子比特读取是量子信息协议的基础。在传统超导量子比特读取中，微波放大器链与非互易元件协同工作，以可容忍的附加噪声和反作用检测量子比特状态。然而，标准非互易元件的损耗、尺寸和磁场问题引发了长达数十年的研究，以寻求更高效且可扩展的替代方案。一种主流方法采用参量耦合模式网络来实现非互易性。尽管这类器件可直接与量子比特的读取腔集成，但目前对由此形成的单量子系统的理解仍存在显著不足。本文提供了一种基于第一性原理的理论工具，用于理解和设计与嵌入式量子比特集成的线性模式网络。我们运用该理论指导并分析了一个集成三模非互易系统的量子比特读取实验实现。通过这一工作，我们在量子比特测量速率和退相干速率的实验数据与理论预测之间取得了高度一致。随后，我们对同一系统作为集成非互易放大器运行进行了理论分析，预测其在合理实验参数下可实现高效率。

Abstract

High fidelity qubit readout is a cornerstone for quantum information protocols. In traditional superconducting qubit readout, a chain of microwave amplifiers and nonreciprocal components aid in detecting the qubit's state with tolerable added noise and backaction. However, the loss, size, and magnetic field of standard nonreciprocal components have sparked a decades-long search for more efficient and scalable alternatives. One prominent approach employs networks of parametrically coupled modes to achieve nonreciprocity. While this class of devices can be directly integrated with the qubit's readout cavity, current understanding of the resulting single quantum system is substantially lacking. Here we provide a first-principles theoretical tool to understand and design networks of linear modes integrated with embedded qubits. We utilize this theory to inform and analyze the experimental implementation of a qubit readout with an integrated three-mode nonreciprocal system. In doing so, we achieve excellent agreement between the experimental and theoretical qubit measurement and dephasing rates. We then theoretically analyze the same system operated as an integrated nonreciprocal amplifier, predicting high efficiency for reasonable experimental parameters.

247. Commutation Groups and State-Independent Contextuality FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Samson Abramsky, Serban-Ion Cercelescu, Carmen-Maria Constantin
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了量子计算中的状态无关上下文性，通过引入交换群（commutation groups）和上下文词（contextual words）来分析和表征这种量子非经典性，并给出了交换群的酉表示。
摘要翻译

我们引入一种用于研究状态无关语境性论证的代数结构，这是一种以著名的佩雷斯-默明魔术方为例证的关键量子非经典性形式，并被用作量子优势的来源。我们提出了由生成元与关系定义的**对易群**，并通过字符串重写系统对其进行分析。同时给出一种线性代数构造，即海森堡群的有向化版本。我们引入**语境性词**作为语境性见证的一般形式。我们刻画了对易群中语境性词出现的条件，并在其他情形下显式构造了非语境性赋值方案。我们还给出了对易群作为广义泡利$n$-群子群的酉表示。

Abstract

We introduce an algebraic structure for studying state-independent contextuality arguments, a key form of quantum non-classicality exemplified by the well-known Peres-Mermin magic square, and used as a source of quantum advantage. We introduce \emph{commutation groups} presented by generators and relations, and analyse them in terms of a string rewriting system. There is also a linear algebraic construction, a directed version of the Heisenberg group. We introduce \emph{contextual words} as a general form of contextuality witness. We characterise when contextual words can arise in commutation groups, and explicitly construct non-contextual value assignments in other cases. We give unitary representations of commutation groups as subgroups of generalized Pauli $n$-groups.

248. Bounds on Agreement between Subjective and Objective Measurements FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Jaden Pieper, Stephen D. Voran
Published: 2026-03-13
TL;DR: 该论文研究了多媒体质量评估中主观测试噪声对客观测量相关性（如Pearson相关系数和均方误差）的影响，并提出了基于主观投票方差的界限计算方法以及一个二项式投票模型（BinoVotes/BinoMOS）来估计这些界限。
摘要翻译

多媒体质量客观评估方法通常通过将估计值与主观“真实数据”进行比较来评判，最常用的指标是皮尔逊相关系数（PCC）或均方误差（MSE）。然而，主观测试结果本身包含噪声，因此追求PCC达到1.0或MSE为0.0既不现实，也不具备可重复性。已有大量研究尝试在客观-主观比较中承认并合理处理主观测试噪声，这通常催生了新的分析框架和评价指标。本文采取了不同的思路：仅基于基本假设，推导出适用于主观测试的PCC与MSE的理论边界。 与直觉一致，这些边界是主观评分方差的函数。当主观测试包含评分方差信息时，边界的计算较为简便，此种情况下我们称所得边界为“完全数据驱动”。针对未提供评分方差信息的情况，我们提出两种边界计算方案：一是借用其他提供此类信息的主观测试的评分方差数据；二是采用主观评分模型。 为此，我们提出了一种基于二项分布的主观评分模型（BinoVotes），该模型自然导出一个具有多项独特优良特性的平均意见分数（MOS）模型，称为BinoMOS。BinoMOS能够复现MOS值的离散特性及其对每个文件所获评分数量的依赖性。该模型提供了计算PCC与MSE边界所需的评分方差信息，我们将其与来自18项主观测试的数据进行了对比。模型计算得到的PCC与MSE边界与直接基于数据得出的边界高度吻合。这些成果使得研究者能够为任何主观测试设定合理的PCC与MSE预期目标，即使对于那些未提供评分方差信息的测试亦然。

Abstract

Objective estimators of multimedia quality are often judged by comparing estimates with subjective "truth data," most often via Pearson correlation coefficient (PCC) or mean-squared error (MSE). But subjective test results contain noise, so striving for a PCC of 1.0 or an MSE of 0.0 is neither realistic nor repeatable. Numerous efforts have been made to acknowledge and appropriately accommodate subjective test noise in objective-subjective comparisons, typically resulting in new analysis frameworks and figures-of-merit. We take a different approach. By making only basic assumptions, we derive bounds on PCC and MSE that can be expected for a subjective test. Consistent with intuition, these bounds are functions of subjective vote variance. When a subjective test includes vote variance information, the calculation of the bounds is easy, and in this case we say the resulting bounds are "fully data-driven." We provide two options for calculating bounds in cases where vote variance information is not available. One option is to use vote variance information from other subjective tests that do provide such information, and the second option is to use a model for subjective votes. Thus we introduce a binomial-based model for subjective votes (BinoVotes) that naturally leads to a mean opinion score (MOS) model, named BinoMOS, with multiple unique desirable properties. BinoMOS reproduces the discrete nature of MOS values and its dependence on the number of votes per file. This modeling provides vote variance information required by the PCC and MSE bounds and we compare this modeling with data from 18 subjective tests. The modeling yields PCC and MSE bounds that agree very well with those found from the data directly. These results allow one to set expectations for the PCC and MSE that might be achieved for any subjective test, even those where vote variance information is not available.

249. Editing Away the Evidence: Diffusion-Based Image Manipulation and the Failure Modes of Robust Watermarking FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Qian Qi, Jiangyun Tang, Jim Lee, Emily Davis, Finn Carter
Published: 2026-03-13
TL;DR: 该论文研究发现扩散模型图像编辑会无意中破坏鲁棒水印，导致水印恢复变得信息理论上不可能，并提出了设计抗生成编辑水印的原则。
摘要翻译

鲁棒隐形水印被广泛应用于支持版权保护、内容溯源与责任认定，其通过嵌入能够经受常见后处理操作的隐藏信号来实现。然而，基于扩散模型的图像编辑引入了一类根本不同的变换：它通过注入噪声并借助强大的生成先验重建图像，往往在保持照片级真实感的同时改变语义内容。本文提供了统一的理论与实证分析，表明非对抗性的扩散编辑可能无意中削弱或移除鲁棒水印。我们将扩散编辑建模为一种随机变换，该变换逐步压缩流形外的扰动，导致许多水印方案所使用的低幅度信号衰减。我们的分析推导了扩散轨迹上水印信噪比与互信息量的界限，从而得出了可靠恢复在信息论意义上变得不可能的条件。我们进一步在一系列基于扩散的编辑场景和强度下评估了代表性水印系统。结果表明，即使是常规的语义编辑也可能显著降低水印的可恢复性。最后，我们讨论了其对内容溯源的影响，并概述了设计能够在生成式图像编辑下保持鲁棒性的水印方法的原则。

Abstract

Robust invisible watermarks are widely used to support copyright protection, content provenance, and accountability by embedding hidden signals designed to survive common post-processing operations. However, diffusion-based image editing introduces a fundamentally different class of transformations: it injects noise and reconstructs images through a powerful generative prior, often altering semantic content while preserving photorealism. In this paper, we provide a unified theoretical and empirical analysis showing that non-adversarial diffusion editing can unintentionally degrade or remove robust watermarks. We model diffusion editing as a stochastic transformation that progressively contracts off-manifold perturbations, causing the low-amplitude signals used by many watermarking schemes to decay. Our analysis derives bounds on watermark signal-to-noise ratio and mutual information along diffusion trajectories, yielding conditions under which reliable recovery becomes information-theoretically impossible. We further evaluate representative watermarking systems under a range of diffusion-based editing scenarios and strengths. The results indicate that even routine semantic edits can significantly reduce watermark recoverability. Finally, we discuss the implications for content provenance and outline principles for designing watermarking approaches that remain robust under generative image editing.

评分理由: 论文研究扩散模型图像编辑对鲁棒水印的破坏机制，属于计算机视觉、图像处理、信息安全领域。研究背景要求医学图像分析、AI临床决策支持等医学应用方向，但论文完全不涉及医学图像、疾病诊断、手术规划等医疗相关内容，所有关键词均与论文主题无关。

diffusion models, image editing, robust watermarking, content provenance, generative prior, signal-to-noise ratio, information theory, copyright protection

250. Prompt-Driven Lightweight Foundation Model for Instance Segmentation-Based Fault Detection in Freight Trains FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Guodong Sun, Qihang Liang, Xingyu Pan, Moyun Liu, Yang Zhang
Published: 2026-03-13
TL;DR: 本文针对货运列车复杂环境下的视觉故障检测挑战，提出了一种基于自提示轻量级基础模型的实例分割框架，在保持低计算开销的同时实现了优于现有方法的检测精度和鲁棒性。
摘要翻译

准确检测货运列车视觉故障仍是智能交通系统维护的关键挑战，这源于复杂的运行环境、结构重复的组件以及安全关键区域频繁出现的遮挡或污染。基于卷积神经网络和Transformer的传统实例分割方法在此类条件下常面临泛化能力不足和边界精度有限的问题。为应对这些挑战，我们提出一种专为货运列车故障检测设计的轻量化自提示实例分割框架。该方法通过引入自提示生成模块，利用Segment Anything Model自动生成任务专用提示，从而有效实现从基础模型到特定领域检测任务的知识迁移。此外，我们采用微型视觉Transformer主干网络以降低计算成本，使该框架适用于铁路监测系统边缘设备的实时部署。我们构建了从真实货运检测站采集的领域专用数据集，并进行了广泛评估。实验结果表明，该方法在数据集上取得了74.6 $AP^{\text{box}}$ 和74.2 $AP^{\text{mask}}$ 的性能，在精度与鲁棒性上均优于现有先进方法，同时保持了较低的计算开销。本工作为自动化货运列车检测提供了一种可部署的高效视觉解决方案，展现了基础模型适配在工业级故障诊断场景中的应用潜力。项目页面：https://github.com/MVME-HBUT/SAM_FTI-FDet.git

Abstract

Accurate visual fault detection in freight trains remains a critical challenge for intelligent transportation system maintenance, due to complex operational environments, structurally repetitive components, and frequent occlusions or contaminations in safety-critical regions. Conventional instance segmentation methods based on convolutional neural networks and Transformers often suffer from poor generalization and limited boundary accuracy under such conditions. To address these challenges, we propose a lightweight self-prompted instance segmentation framework tailored for freight train fault detection. Our method leverages the Segment Anything Model by introducing a self-prompt generation module that automatically produces task-specific prompts, enabling effective knowledge transfer from foundation models to domain-specific inspection tasks. In addition, we adopt a Tiny Vision Transformer backbone to reduce computational cost, making the framework suitable for real-time deployment on edge devices in railway monitoring systems. We construct a domain-specific dataset collected from real-world freight inspection stations and conduct extensive evaluations. Experimental results show that our method achieves 74.6 $AP^{\text{box}}$ and 74.2 $AP^{\text{mask}}$ on the dataset, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods in both accuracy and robustness while maintaining low computational overhead. This work offers a deployable and efficient vision solution for automated freight train inspection, demonstrating the potential of foundation model adaptation in industrial-scale fault diagnosis scenarios. Project page: https://github.com/MVME-HBUT/SAM_FTI-FDet.git

251. Budget-Sensitive Discovery Scoring: A Formally Verified Framework for Evaluating AI-Guided Scientific Selection FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Abhinaba Basu, Pavan Chakraborty
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 本文提出了一个预算敏感的发现评分框架（BSDS/DQS）来评估AI引导的科学候选选择策略，并以药物发现为例证明现有机器学习方法优于大语言模型，未提供额外价值。
摘要翻译

科学发现日益依赖人工智能系统筛选需经昂贵实验验证的候选对象，但目前缺乏用于比较筛选策略的、具有预算意识的原则性评估框架——这一空白因大语言模型（LLM）的出现而加剧，因为LLM能生成看似合理的科学提案却缺乏可靠的下游评估方法。我们提出预算敏感发现分数（BSDS），这是一个经过形式化验证的指标（包含20个由Lean 4证明辅助器机器验证的定理），该指标在每一预算层级上同时惩罚错误发现（λ加权的错误发现率）与过度弃选（γ加权的覆盖缺口）。其预算平均形式——发现质量分数（DQS）——提供了单一汇总统计量，确保任何提案者无法通过在某特定预算下的优异表现人为提升评分。 作为案例研究，我们将BSDS/DQS应用于以下问题：在药物发现候选分子筛选的现有机器学习流程中，LLM是否具有边际价值？我们在MoleculeNet HIV数据集（41,127种化合物，活性率3.5%，1,000次自助抽样）上，分别采用随机划分和骨架划分策略，评估了39种提案者——包括11种机制变体、14种零样本LLM配置和14种少样本LLM配置——使用SMILES分子表示。研究得出三项结论：首先，基于随机森林的Greedy-ML提案者获得最佳DQS（-0.046），优于所有多层感知机变体及LLM配置；其次，在HIV或Tox21数据集的零样本或少样本评估中，没有任何LLM能超越Greedy-ML基线，这证实LLM在已有训练分类器基础上未提供边际价值；最后，该提案者排序体系在五个MoleculeNet基准测试中具有普适性（数据分布覆盖0.18%-46.2%的阳性率范围），适用于非药物视听安全领域，并在9×7维惩罚参数网格中保持稳定（τ ≥ 0.636，平均τ = 0.863）。本框架可推广至任何需要在预算约束和非对称错误成本下筛选候选对象的应用场景。

Abstract

Scientific discovery increasingly relies on AI systems to select candidates for expensive experimental validation, yet no principled, budget-aware evaluation framework exists for comparing selection strategies -- a gap intensified by large language models (LLMs), which generate plausible scientific proposals without reliable downstream evaluation. We introduce the Budget-Sensitive Discovery Score (BSDS), a formally verified metric -- 20 theorems machine-checked by the Lean 4 proof assistant -- that jointly penalizes false discoveries (lambda-weighted FDR) and excessive abstention (gamma-weighted coverage gap) at each budget level. Its budget-averaged form, the Discovery Quality Score (DQS), provides a single summary statistic that no proposer can inflate by performing well at a cherry-picked budget. As a case study, we apply BSDS/DQS to: do LLMs add marginal value to an existing ML pipeline for drug discovery candidate selection? We evaluate 39 proposers -- 11 mechanistic variants, 14 zero-shot LLM configurations, and 14 few-shot LLM configurations -- using SMILES representations on MoleculeNet HIV (41,127 compounds, 3.5% active, 1,000 bootstrap replicates) under both random and scaffold splits. Three findings emerge. First, the simple RF-based Greedy-ML proposer achieves the best DQS (-0.046), outperforming all MLP variants and LLM configurations. Second, no LLM surpasses the Greedy-ML baseline under zero-shot or few-shot evaluation on HIV or Tox21, establishing that LLMs provide no marginal value over an existing trained classifier. Third, the proposer hierarchy generalizes across five MoleculeNet benchmarks spanning 0.18%-46.2% prevalence, a non-drug AV safety domain, and a 9x7 grid of penalty parameters (tau >= 0.636, mean tau = 0.863). The framework applies to any setting where candidates are selected under budget constraints and asymmetric error costs.

252. Self-Reported Side Effects of Semaglutide and Tirzepatide in Online Communities FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Neil K. R. Sehgal, Jena Shaw Tronieri, Lyle Ungar, Sharath Chandra Guntuku
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该研究通过分析社交媒体数据，揭示了患者使用司美格鲁肽和替尔泊肽后自我报告的副作用，发现了胃肠道症状为主以及未被充分认识的潜在生殖和体温相关症状，补充了传统药物安全监测的不足。
摘要翻译

社交媒体能够揭示患者使用胰高血糖素样肽-1受体激动剂（GLP-1 RAs）的体验，这些信息超出了临床试验数据的范畴。我们分析了410,198篇提及司美格鲁肽（semaglutide）或替尔泊肽（tirzepatide）的Reddit帖子（时间范围为2019年5月至2025年6月）。共有67,008名用户自述使用了这些药物，其中43.5%描述了至少一种副作用。胃肠道症状最为普遍，包括恶心（36.9%）、疲劳（16.7%）、呕吐（16.3%）、便秘（15.3%）和腹泻（12.6%）。值得注意的是，生殖系统症状（如月经不规律）和温度相关不适（如寒战、潮热）作为未被充分认识的潜在效应浮现出来。这些发现突显了当前药品说明书或试验未能充分捕捉的患者关切。大规模社交媒体分析能够通过检测新出现的安全信号并拓展对GLP-1 RAs真实世界安全性特征的理解，从而对传统药物警戒体系形成补充。

Abstract

Social media can reveal patient experiences with glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1 RAs) that extend beyond clinical trial data. We analyzed 410,198 Reddit posts (May 2019-June 2025) mentioning semaglutide or tirzepatide. A total of 67,008 users self-reported using these medications, and 43.5% described at least one side effect. Gastrointestinal symptoms predominated, including nausea (36.9%), fatigue (16.7%), vomiting (16.3%), constipation (15.3%), and diarrhea (12.6%). Notably, reproductive symptoms (e.g., menstrual irregularities) and temperature-related complaints (e.g., chills, hot flashes) emerged as unrecognized potential effects. These findings highlight patient concerns not well captured in current labeling or trials. Large-scale social media analysis can complement traditional pharmacovigilance by detecting emerging safety signals and expanding understanding of the real-world safety profile of GLP-1 RAs.

253. PesTwin: a biology-informed Digital Twin for enabling precision farming FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Andrea De Antoni, Matteo Rucco, Alberto Maria Cattaneo, Ege Gezer, Giuseppe Sulis, Paola Draicchio, Giovanni Iacca, Andrea Pugliese, Maria Vittoria Mancini
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于代理建模的数字孪生框架PesTwin，用于模拟和预测入侵性害虫（如果蝇）在真实农田环境中的时空传播，以支持精准农业和害虫综合治理。
摘要翻译

在农业需求不断增长、粮食安全与可及性面临新挑战的背景下，提升农业生产力比以往任何时候都更为重要。减少入侵性昆虫物种造成的损害是实现这一目标的关键杠杆。为应对这些挑战，并遵循精准农业与害虫综合防治（Integrated Pest Management, IPM）原则，本文提出了一种创新的模拟框架，旨在构建害虫入侵的数字孪生体。该框架基于智能体建模（Agent-Based Modeling, ABM）范式，采用灵活的规则驱动方法，支持对害虫与其寄主作物及环境间主要生态相互作用进行精细化调整。通过整合多源异构数据——实验室收集的害虫生物数据、气象站提供的环境数据以及真实农田的地理信息系统（GIS）数据，该框架能够实现时空维度上对现实场景中虫害暴发的预测。本研究以全球性软果害虫——入侵性果蝇铃木氏果蝇（Drosophila suzukii，亦称斑翅果蝇/Spotted Wing Drosophila, SWD）为例，展示了该框架的具体应用。

Abstract

In a context of growing agricultural demand and new challenges related to food security and accessibility, boosting agricultural productivity is more important than ever. Reducing the damage caused by invasive insect species is a crucial lever to achieve this objective. In support of these challenges, and in line with the principles of precision agriculture and Integrated Pest Management (IPM), an innovative simulation framework is presented, aiming to become the digital twin of a pest invasion. Through a flexible rule-based approach of the Agent-Based Modeling (ABM) paradigm, the framework supports the fine-tuning of the main ecological interactions of the pest with its crop host and the environment. Forecasting insect infestation in realistic scenarios, considering both spatial and temporal dimensions, is made possible by integrating heterogeneous data sources: pest biodata collected in the laboratory, environmental data from weather stations, and GIS data of a real crop field. In this study, an application to the global pest of soft fruit, the invasive fruit fly Drosophila suzukii, also known as Spotted Wing Drosophila (SWD), is presented.
